moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games officially begins today in Glasgow, Scotland, with the opening ceremony live on Channel 5, bringing together 3,000 athletes from 74 nations and territories for 11 days of competition.

angles.name: National Excitement
angles.copy: Let the Games begin! The Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 opens tonight with the spectacular ceremony on Channel 5. Who are you backing for gold?

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: Glasgow, it's your time to shine! The Commonwealth Games are officially open, bringing the world to our doorstep. Get ready for an incredible 11 days of sport!

angles.name: Welsh Hopes
angles.copy: Our Welsh athletes are ready to make us proud! The Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 begins today. Good luck to Team Wales!

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Many UK Schools
moments.blurb: Today marks the official start of the summer holidays for many schools across England, with Scotland already breaking up and Northern Ireland to follow, ushering in weeks of sunshine (hopefully) and family fun.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: School's OUT for summer! For many across the UK, today marks the start of the long-awaited summer holidays. Time for adventures!

angles.name: Parental Perspective
angles.copy: And so it begins... the summer holidays are officially here for many! Wishing all parents and kids a fantastic (and calm!) few weeks.

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Devon, get ready for summer fun! School's out for many across the county today. What are your plans for the next few weeks?

moments.title: Truck Festival Kicks Off in Oxfordshire
moments.blurb: The Truck Festival, a popular indie and rock music festival, begins today in Steventon, Oxfordshire, running until Sunday, July 26th, featuring a line-up of established and emerging artists.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Truck Festival 2026 is officially GO! Who's heading to Oxfordshire this weekend for some incredible live music and festival vibes?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're looking for weekend plans, Truck Festival kicks off today in Oxfordshire! Expect a cracking line-up and brilliant atmosphere.

moments.title: Who Do You Think You Are? Returns
moments.blurb: The popular genealogy series 'Who Do You Think You Are?' returns tonight on BBC One at 9pm, with actor Adeel Akhtar delving into his family history.

angles.name: Tonight's TV Pick
angles.copy: The much-loved 'Who Do You Think You Are?' is back tonight on BBC One! Grab a cuppa and get ready to delve into Adeel Akhtar's past at 9pm.

angles.name: Family History
angles.copy: Always fascinating to see the journeys on 'Who Do You Think You Are?'. What family secrets would you love to uncover?

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday today, known for his iconic riffs and stage presence.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! The top hat, the guitar, the riffs... a true rock icon. What's your favourite GNR track?

angles.name: Iconic Riffs
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 61st birthday to the legendary Slash! Those iconic guitar solos defined a generation. Rock on!

moments.title: Michelle Williams Turns 46
moments.blurb: Singer Michelle Williams, best known as a member of Destiny's Child, celebrates her 46th birthday today.

angles.name: Destiny's Child Star
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Michelle Williams! From Destiny's Child to solo success, she's a true talent. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the incredible Michelle Williams, who turns 46 today! Still 'Say My Name' levels of brilliant.

moments.title: David Essex Turns 79
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex, known for hits like 'Rock On' and his stage roles, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: British Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary David Essex! From 'Rock On' to 'Evita', a true British icon. What's your favourite of his tracks?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to David Essex! Still sounds as good as ever. Tune in for some classic hits!

moments.title: T100 Triathlon London This Weekend
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon series comes to London this weekend, July 25-26, featuring elite triathletes competing in a demanding swim, bike, run event.

angles.name: London Sporting Action
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious endurance! The T100 Triathlon hits London this weekend, bringing elite athletes to the capital. Who's watching?

angles.name: Triathlon Challenge
angles.copy: Swim, bike, run! The T100 Triathlon is in London this Saturday and Sunday. An incredible test of human endurance.

moments.title: Verdine White Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the iconic bassist and a founding member of Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire, who turns 75 on Saturday! That bassline energy is unmatched. What's your favourite EWF jam?

angles.name: Earth Wind & Fire Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Verdine White! Still bringing that 'Boogie Wonderland' magic. Get down this weekend!

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th, continuing his reign as a rock 'n' roll legend.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman. Still got the moves like Jagger!

angles.name: Rolling Stones Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger this Sunday! What's your all-time favourite Rolling Stones track?

moments.title: Roger Taylor Turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26th, a vital force behind one of the world's greatest bands.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! Those iconic beats are unforgettable.

angles.name: Behind the Beat
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Roger Taylor! The man who helped give us some of the greatest rock anthems ever. What's your favourite Queen song?

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Golf Championship
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's major championships, takes place from July 29th to August 2nd at Royal Lytham and St Annes in Lancashire.

angles.name: Major Golf Event
angles.copy: The AIG Women's Open tees off next week at Royal Lytham and St Annes! One of golf's biggest championships is back in the UK.

angles.name: Women's Sport
angles.copy: Exciting times for golf fans! The AIG Women's Open, a major championship, starts next Wednesday. Who are you hoping to see lift the trophy?
